en.text: probably identical with H3334 (through the squeezing into shape); (compare H3331); to mould into a form; especially as apotter; figuratively, to determine (i.e. form a resolution)

senses.gloss_en: probably identical with H3334 (through the squeezing into shape); (compare H3331); to mould into a form; especially as apotter; figuratively, to determine (i.e. form a resolution)
